_comment: Model & texture library: trusted Roblox asset IDs grouped by category. Claude prefers these over generating geometry. Each entry: id (number), name, source ('uploaded' or 'creator-store'). If nothing here fits, Claude searches the Creator Store via the MCP for a high-rated free asset; if that also fails it logs a request to the game's design/asset-requests.md. Shared source of truth - edit in the repo so everyone gets updates.
_usage: Insert by asset id (rbxassetid:// / InsertService / MCP insert). Verify the asset is free/owned and appropriate before use.

fx_particle.description: Particle / VFX assets for game feel.
